title: Water Regeneration
description: Gives regeneration while you are in water.
body:
# ❤️ Water Regeneration

**Water Regeneration** is a simple Minecraft datapack that gives regeneration while you are in water.

![Main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C6GudLYl/images/38aefe583d1bbee133b684e35cd331047c81448c.gif)
## ✨ Features

- Provides visual alerts when regenereting.
- You can individually enable or disable the regeneration system for each player.
- You can customize regeneration power with only one command.
- Works in singleplayer and multiplayer.

## 🛠️ Settings

You can easily enable or disable each players water regeneration at any time using the following commands:

- ✅ **Enable regeneration:**  
  `/tag (player) add disable_water_regen`

- ❌ **Disable regeneration:**  
  `/tag (player) remove disable_water_regen`

You can easily customize regeneration power at any time using the following command:
- 🛠️ **Customize regeneration:**  
  `/data modify storage water water set value {power:[powerlevel]}` (Default Value:2)

**Example:** `/data modify storage water water set value {power:2}`

## 📦 Installation

1. Download the datapack `.zip` file.
2. Place it in your world's `datapacks` folder.
3. Use `/reload` after joining the world.
4. You're all set! Move around and see your coordinates at the bottom of your screen.

## 🧱 Compatibility

- Minecraft Java Edition 1.13+
- No external resource packs needed
